name: Vicarious liability - can boss pay if employee hit me at work in SLC?
description: Yes if within scope of employment.[1]

mainEntity.name: Vicarious liability - can boss pay if employee hit me at work in SLC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if within scope of employment.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes if accident in scope of employment under Utah Code 78B-5-618.[1] Comp primary. Key factors: (1) Employer-employee relation; (2) Job duties at time; (3) Control exercised; (4) Evidence like schedules. Pursue comp, then employer suit if applicable. Lawyer assesses liability.
